heading: Power to make arrangements respecting atomic energy materials as unaffected
label: 504 Power to make arrangements respecting atomic energy materials as unaffected
text: Except as this chapter provides for (a) validation of certain mining claims located on lands described in , and (b) the modification and amendment of certain withdrawals or reservations of land, nothing in this chapter shall affect any power or authority duly vested in the Atomic Energy Commission or any other agency, department or officer of the United States to make leases, withdrawals, reservations or other arrangements with respect to source materials as defined in section 5(b)(1) of the Atomic Energy Act of 1946, as amended.section 501 of this title
notes: References in TextSection 5(b)(1) of the Atomic Energy Act of 1946, referred to in text, was formerly classified to , The Public Health and Welfare, and defined “source material”. Such term is defined in section 11(z) of the Atomic Energy Act of 1954, as amended, which is classified to .section 1805(b)(1) of Title 42section 2014(z) of Title 42

Transfer of FunctionsAtomic Energy Commission abolished and functions transferred by sections 5814 and 5841 of Title 42, The Public Health and Welfare. See, also, Transfer of Functions notes set out under those sections.
